title: Filter
description: Abstract base class for post-process filters applied to a drawable's render output. Filters are rendered into a temporary RenderTexture (the `output`) that is composited back onto the scene after all filters in the chain have been applied. Subclasses implement apply to run their shader pass. Stock implementations: BlurFilter, ColorFilter. User-supplied GLSL/WGSL shaders: WebGl2ShaderFilter, WebGpuShaderFilter.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Abstract base class for post-process filters applied to a drawable's render output.

Filters are rendered into a temporary RenderTexture (the `output`) that is composited back onto the scene after all filters in the chain have been applied. Subclasses implement apply to run their shader pass. Stock implementations: BlurFilter, ColorFilter. User-supplied GLSL/WGSL shaders: WebGl2ShaderFilter, WebGpuShaderFilter.

members.name: apply
members.signature: apply(backend: RenderBackend, input: RenderTexture, output: RenderTexture): void
members.description: Execute one filter pass: sample from input, write the result to output. Both textures are the same dimensions as the filtered drawable's bounding box.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Release any GPU-side resources held by this filter (uniform buffers, pipelines, intermediate textures). Default is a no-op for stateless filters; subclasses with state (BlurFilter, ColorFilter) override.
